personal.name: Bintang Muhammad
personal.title: Business Intelligence Analyst & Engineer
personal.subtitle: BINTANG MUHAMMAD
summary: Experienced Analytics Engineer and BI Analyst with a Master's in Applied Business Analytics and 4+ years of expertise in Python, SQL, and Django.
Specializes in building high-performance production data pipelines and optimizing database queries across the Retail, Fashion, and F&B sectors.
Bridges the gap between complex backend engineering and strategic stakeholder decisions through automated reporting, interactive dashboards, and scalable data infrastructure.
Actively expanding into the Web3 ecosystem with hands-on expertise in crypto trading, market structure analysis, and on-chain analytics.

skills.name: Python & Django
skills.description: Building automated data processing suites, extracting querysets, developing backend client dashboards, and running predictive machine learning pipelines.

skills.name: SQL & ClickHouse
skills.description: Constructing fast queries, indexing large-scale transaction databases, and setting up persistent reporting pipelines using ClickHouse & Metabase.

skills.name: Data Visualization
skills.description: Designing interactive executive-facing dashboards, automating scheduled client delivery, and building cohesive storyboards for business reviews.

skills.name: Cloud & Pipelines
skills.description: Deploying data pipelines and reporting scripts on AWS S3 / GCP, creating automated CRON loops, and managing static types.

skills.name: On-Chain & BI Analytics
skills.description: Conducting technical charting, exploring spot trading mechanics, analyzing cryptocurrency transaction trees, and building on-chain dashboards.

experience.title: Business Intelligence Analyst & Engineer
highlights: Delivered 30+ customized routine reports for enterprise clients including Levi's, Burger King, and Tim Hortons Singapore, driving data-backed strategic decisions across multi-merchant networks.
Executed complex ad-hoc analytics including cohort analysis, customer movement tracking, store-level investigations, and forecasting to resolve critical client business inquiries.
Isolated and generated targeted marketing lists of 100k - 800k users based on multi-criteria behavioral data and customer profile attributes for WhatsApp and email campaigns.
Engineered Scikit-Learn conversion models that increased email CTR by 22.31% and boosted revenue per open email by 184.36% using an end-to-end Django, Pandas, and NumPy pipeline.
Bridged technical and non-technical stakeholders by translating complex data pipeline anomalies and operational insights into clear, actionable business strategies.
Designed and deployed user-based Association Rule recommendation systems from scratch, delivering personalized product suggestions to approximately 900,000 users.
Built 20+ interactive Metabase dashboards using SQL and ClickHouse database infrastructure, while maintaining and debugging Python-based backend production dashboards.
Automated daily reporting pipelines and pushed encrypted data directly to AWS S3, resolving Sentry log flaws to ensure robust production delivery.
Sanitized over 1 million database entries and established automated data validation protocols to completely eliminate presentation-level reporting errors.
Engineered complex bonus calculation systems for Cimory (BSM, BPK, TPJ, MBM) with multi-criteria eligibility filters spanning attendance, timelines, and sales experience.
Optimized critical reporting queries 10x to 100x using cursor-based pagination, completely eliminating server Out-Of-Memory (OOM) errors on 1M+ record datasets.
Developed 8+ automated test suites to validate data integrity for high-stakes financial rewards and loyalty point allocation calculations.
Maintained production-grade code quality by integrating static type checking (mypy) and automated linting within comprehensive GitHub CI/CD workflows.

experience.title: Student Development Coordinator (Part-Time)
highlights: Mentored and guided 15 students in the Data Analytics vertical, delivering high-quality professional and portfolio reviews that led to successful placements.
Evaluated weekly projects and homework submissions, providing actionable feedback on SQL schema designs, Tableau dashboards, and business insights.

experience.title: New Business Associate (Contract)
highlights: Coordinated standard cross-border operations across 5 countries to streamline Grab's 'Clean and Fix' and 'Attractions' features.
Analyzed historical operations records and engineered budget forecast models that shaped pricing parameters and competitor defensive positioning.

experience.title: Junior Partnership Analyst
highlights: Collaborated with external fintech partners to roll out working capital financing, pre-approved pay-later, and commercial insurance products.
Synthesized digital product velocity reports on a weekly basis, directly shaping Ralali's industrial inventory targets and pricing structures.
Parsed 110,000 transaction records to extract 10,740 highly qualified accounts for customized underwriting and credit segmentation programs.
